extension.name: Helix3 and Shaper_Helix3 J3 Security Patch
extension.author: JoomShaper
extension.description: This package applies critical security patches for the Helix3 System Plugin and the shaper_helix3 template on Joomla 3.10.x. After successfully copying and overwriting the patched files, this installer package will automatically uninstall itself to leave no trace.

server.name: Helix3 and Shaper_Helix3 J3 Security Patch
